subject: fix(map): revert station labels to collision-aware placement
body:
text-allow-overlap: true caused price labels to stack unreadably when
clusters break apart. Restored text-allow-overlap: false with
text-optional: true — circles always render, labels hide when they
would overlap. Cluster count labels keep overlap: true (always needed).

Tags: map, ui
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: map
Semver: patch
